nodes.name: 东非
nodes.summary: 东非是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联42种鸟类，包括Eastern crested guinea fowl、Dusky turtle dove、Quail-plover等42种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Northern red-fronted tinkerbird
nodes.summary: Northern red-fronted tinkerbird（Northern red-fronted tinkerbird，学名 Pogoniulus uropygialis），主要分布于东非。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: uropygialis in coastal Kenya]] The northern red-fronted tinkerbird (Pogoniulus uropygialis) is a small bird in the African barbet family Lybiidae that is found in East Africa
